name: bench
description: peerBench is a bounded Grok + MiMo review helper for Codex.

interface.longDescription: peerBench uses Grok and MiMo for a bounded turn review, native pre-push protection, and manual read-only reviews and bug hunts. In Codex it installs one lightweight Stop hook.
defaultPrompt: Run peerBench setup in this repo.
Use peerBench to review my current changes.
Use peerBench to hunt for bugs in this project.
